things.name: Airborne Museum Hartenstein
things.description: Outstanding WWII museum in the former British headquarters during Operation Market Garden (1944); tells the story of the Battle of Arnhem with remarkable immersive exhibits

things.name: John Frost Bridge
things.description: The famous A Bridge Too Far; the Rhine road bridge that British paratroopers held for four days in September 1944; now a symbol of heroism and sacrifice

things.name: Open Air Museum (Openluchtmuseum)
things.description: One of Europe's finest open-air museums with 100 authentic historic buildings relocated from across the Netherlands, spanning 400 years of Dutch rural life

things.name: Burgers' Zoo
things.description: One of Europe's most innovative zoos with vast indoor tropical habitats including a rainforest, mangrove swamp and safari savannah for free-ranging animals

things.name: Museum Arnhem
things.description: Regional art museum with a strong collection of Dutch Impressionism and the modern art of the Gelderland region in a restored historic building

things.name: Gelderland Countryside
things.description: The Veluwe, Europe's largest inland sand drift area, surrounds Arnhem with heathland, forests and dunes; excellent for cycling through De Hoge Veluwe National Park

things.name: Kroller-Muller Museum
things.description: World-class museum in the Hoge Veluwe National Park with the world's second-largest Van Gogh collection and an extraordinary sculpture garden

things.name: Oosterbeek War Cemetery
things.description: Moving CWGC cemetery containing 1,754 Allied soldiers who fell in Operation Market Garden; the Last Post is sounded here every year on Remembrance Sunday

things.name: Arnhem City Centre
things.description: Post-war rebuilt city centre with the fashion district around Korenmarkt, the historic Sabelspoort city gate and the lively Saturday market

things.name: GelreDome
things.description: Home of Vitesse Arnhem with 26,600 capacity and a retractable roof; one of the Eredivisie's most atmospheric grounds with a passionate Yellow-and-Black support
